name: AI COO — No-Show Follow-Up

trigger.description: Fires when a booked strategy call is marked as no-show in GHL calendar

config.message: Hey {{contact.firstName}}, we missed you on our call today! Would you like to reschedule? Here's my calendar: {{CALENDAR_LINK}}

config.subject: Missed our call — here's what we were going to cover

config.condition: Contact has NOT booked new appointment

notes: No-shows are not dead leads — they booked once, which means intent was there. The SMS fires first because it's faster and more personal. The 3-day wait before moving to Nurture gives them time to rebook without feeling pressured.
